case_title: PATEL, N.A. vs. LAMBERT, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LAMBERT, ROBERT URLUSTEQUL, JESUS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAMBERT, ROBERT URLUSTEQUL, JESUS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 6TH ST, #348, S.F, CA. $607.50 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $687.50, STAYED UNTIL FEB-19-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, MUTUAL RELEAS OF CLAIMS. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. DEF. REPRESENTS THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCU- PANTS. IF DEF. VACATES BY 5PM, 2-19-94, PL. WAIVES ALL BACK RENT, DAMAGES & COSTS. SEE FILE FOR JUDGMENT DETAILS.
